CREATE TABLE test_values (id INT, value FLOAT);
INSERT INTO test_values (id, value) VALUES (6, NULL);
SELECT id, iszero(value) AS is_zero FROM test_values WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, iszero(value) AS is_zero FROM (SELECT * FROM test_values WHERE id < 5) AS subquery;
SELECT t1.id, t1.value, iszero(t2.value) AS is_zero_t2 FROM test_values AS t1 JOIN test_values AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE t1.value < 2;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_values WHERE iszero(value) = 1;
SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_values WHERE iszero(value) = 1 GROUP BY value;
WITH zero_check AS (SELECT id, iszero(value) AS is_zero FROM test_values) SELECT COUNT(*) FROM zero_check WHERE is_zero = 1;
SELECT id, iszero(value) FROM test_values WHERE value IN (SELECT value FROM test_values WHERE id > 2) AND iszero(value) = 1;
